'''âdh-m-y-w''' ('''kadhamyewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monetarise|monetarise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-m-y-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monetarise|monetarise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-m-y-w
|-
! Lemma
| kadhamyewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhamyewoko|thidhamyewoko]] || [[word:jidhamyewoko|jidhamyewoko]] || [[word:shidhamyewoko|shidhamyewoko]] || [[word:kidhamyewoko|kidhamyewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhamyewoko|thuthudhamyewoko]] || [[word:jujudhamyewoko|jujudhamyewoko]] || [[word:shushudhamyewoko|shushudhamyewoko]] || [[word:kukudhamyewoko|kukudhamyewoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhamyewoko|thedhamyewoko]] || [[word:jedhamyewoko|jedhamyewoko]] || [[word:shedhamyewoko|shedhamyewoko]] || [[word:kedhamyewoko|kedhamyewoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhamyewoko|thodhamyewoko]] || [[word:jodhamyewoko|jodhamyewoko]] || [[word:shodhamyewoko|shodhamyewoko]] || [[word:kodhamyewoko|kodhamyewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhamyewoko|thodhamyewoko]] || [[word:jodhamyewoko|jodhamyewoko]] || [[word:shodhamyewoko|shodhamyewoko]] || [[word:kodhamyewoko|kodhamyewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhamyewoko|thĂŠdhamyewoko]] || [[word:jĂŠdhamyewoko|jĂŠdhamyewoko]] || [[word:shĂŠdhamyewoko|shĂŠdhamyewoko]] || [[word:kĂŠdhamyewoko|kĂŠdhamyewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhamyewoko|thathadhamyewoko]] || [[word:jajadhamyewoko|jajadhamyewoko]] || [[word:shashadhamyewoko|shashadhamyewoko]] || [[word:kakadhamyewoko|kakadhamyewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhamyewoko|thadhamyewoko]] || [[word:jadhamyewoko|jadhamyewoko]] || [[word:shadhamyewoko|shadhamyewoko]] || [[word:kadhamyewoko|kadhamyewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhamyewoko|thadhamyewoko]] || [[word:jadhamyewoko|jadhamyewoko]] || [[word:shadhamyewoko|shadhamyewoko]] || [[word:kadhamyewoko|kadhamyewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadhamyewithi|shadhamyewithi]] || [[word:shadhamyewiji|shadhamyewiji]] || [[word:shadhamyewishi|shadhamyewishi]] || [[word:shadhamyewiki|shadhamyewiki]]
